briefdescription.para: The URL of the image.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "url", type Property::STRING or Property::ARRAY of Property::STRING.
The array form is used for generating animated image visuals.
The number of threads used for local and remote image loading can be controlled by the environment variables DALI_TEXTURE_LOCAL_THREADS and DALI_TEXTURE_REMOTE_THREADS respectively. The default values are 4 threads for local image loading and 8 threads for remote image loading.
Mandatory.

briefdescription.para: Whether to load the image synchronously.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "synchronousLoading", type Property::BOOLEAN.
Optional. If not specified, the default is false, i.e. the image is loaded asynchronously.
For Normal Quad images only.

briefdescription.para: The desired image width.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "desiredWidth", type Property::INTEGER.
Optional. If not specified, the actual image width is used.
For Normal Quad images only.

briefdescription.para: The desired image height.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "desiredHeight", type Property::INTEGER.
Optional. If not specified, the actual image height is used.
For Normal Quad images only.

briefdescription.para: Filtering options, used when resizing images to sample original pixels.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "samplingMode", type Dali::SamplingMode (Property::INTEGER) or Property::STRING.
Optional. If not supplied, default is SamplingMode::BOX.
For Normal Quad images only.
Dali::SamplingMode

briefdescription.para: The image area to be displayed.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "pixelArea", type Property::VECTOR4. It is a rectangular area. The first two elements indicate the top-left position of the area, and the last two elements are the area width and height respectively.
Optional. If not specified, the default value is [0.0, 0.0, 1.0, 1.0], i.e. the entire area of the image.
For Normal Quad images only.

briefdescription.para: The wrap mode for u coordinate.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "wrapModeU", type Dali::WrapMode::Type (Property::INTEGER) or Property::STRING. It decides how the texture should be sampled when the u coordinate exceeds the range of 0.0 to 1.0.
Optional. If not specified, the default is CLAMP.
For Normal QUAD image only.

briefdescription.para: The wrap mode for v coordinate.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "wrapModeV", type Dali::WrapMode::Type (Property::INTEGER) or Property::STRING. it decides how the texture should be sampled when the v coordinate exceeds the range of 0.0 to 1.0.
Optional. If not specified, the default is CLAMP.
For Normal QUAD image only.

briefdescription.para: Whether to enable broken image in image visual. Some of visual don't need to show broken image(ex. placeholder) Disable broken image for these visuals. default is true.
The policy to determine when an image should be loaded.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "loadPolicy", Type Ui::Image::LoadPolicy (Property::INTEGER)or Property::STRING.
Default Ui::Image::LoadPolicy::ATTACHED
Ui::Image::LoadPolicy:

briefdescription.para: The policy to determine when an image request to be released so should no longer be cached.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "releasePolicy", Type Ui::Image::ReleasePolicy (Property::INTEGER) or Property::STRING
Default Ui::Image::ReleasePolicy::DETACHED
Ui::Image::ReleasePolicy

briefdescription.para: The fitting mode of the visual.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "fittingMode", Type Ui::Image::FittingMode (Property::INTEGER) or Property::STRING.
Default Ui::Image::FittingMode::FILL
Ui::Image::FittingMode

briefdescription.para: Determines if image orientation should be corrected so the image displays as it was intended.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "orientationCorrection", Type Property::BOOLEAN, if true the image's orientation will be corrected.
Default true

briefdescription.para: Whether to synchronize image texture size to visual size.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "synchronousSizing", type Property::BOOLEAN. If this property is true, ImageVisual ignores mDesiredSize.
Used by the ImageVisual. The default is false.

briefdescription.para: If true, uploads texture before ResourceReady signal is emitted. Otherwise uploads after texture load is completed.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "fastTrackUploading", type Property::BOOLEAN If true, the upload happens without event-thread dependency, but the following need to be considered:
Texture size is not valid until upload is fully complete.
Texture cannot be cached (a new image is uploaded every time).
Seamless visual change is not supported.
The following, if set are also not supported and will be ignored:
Alpha masking
Synchronous loading
Reload action
Custom shader
Used by the ImageVisual. The default is false.

briefdescription.para: The border of the image.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "border", type Property::EXTENTS, Property::RECTANGLE or Property::VECTOR4. The border of the image in the order: left, right, top, bottom.
Optional.
For N-Patch images only.

briefdescription.para: If true, only draws the borders.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "borderOnly", type Property::BOOLEAN.
Optional. If not specified, the default is false.
For N-Patch images only.

briefdescription.para: Overlays the auxiliary image on top of an NPatch image.

detaileddescription.para: The resulting visual image will be at least as large as the smallest possible n-patch or the auxiliary image, whichever is larger.

Name "auxiliaryImage", Type Property::STRING, URL of the image.
Default true

briefdescription.para: An alpha value for mixing between the masked main NPatch image and the auxiliary image.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "auxiliaryImageAlpha", Type Property::FLOAT, between 0 and 1
Default 0

briefdescription.para: Enables/disables premultiplied alpha.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "premultipliedAlpha", type Property::BOOLEAN.
Optional.
The premultiplied alpha is true for ImageVisual, and false for AnimatedImageVisual.

briefdescription.para: URL of a masking image.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "alphaMaskUrl", type Property::STRING, URL of image to apply as a mask after image loading. If set after the main URL has finished loading, this may necessitate a re-load of the main image. The alpha mask image will be scaled on load to match the size of the main image, then applied to the pixel data before uploading to GL.
Optional.

briefdescription.para: The scale factor to apply to the content image before masking.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "maskContentScale", type Property::FLOAT, The scale factor to apply to the content before masking. Note, scaled images are cropped to the same size as the alpha mask.
Optional.

briefdescription.para: Whether to crop image to mask or scale mask to fit image.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "cropToMask", type Property::BOOLEAN, True if the image should be cropped to match the mask size, or false if the image should remain the same size.
Optional, Default true
If this is false, then the mask is scaled to fit the image before being applied.

briefdescription.para: Whether to apply mask in loading time or rendering time.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "maskingType", type Ui::Image::MaskingType (Property::INTEGER). In general, Ui::Image::MASKING_ON_LOADING is the default behavior. However, if the visual uses an external texture, only MASKING_ON_RENDERING is possible. So we change its value to MASKING_ON_RENDERING even if the visual sets the MASKING_TYPE as MASKING_ON_LOADING when it uses external texture.
The default is Ui::Image::MASKING_ON_LOADING.

briefdescription.para: The number of times the AnimatedImageVisual or AnimatedVectorImageVisual will be looped.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "loopCount", type Property::INTEGER.
For Animated images only. Default -1. if < 0, loop unlimited. else, loop loopCount times.

briefdescription.para: The playing range the AnimatedVectorImageVisual will use.

detaileddescription.para: Animation will play between the values specified. The array can have two integer values. Or it can have one or two strings, which are markers. More will be ignored. Both values should be between 0 and the total frame number, otherwise they will be ignored. If the range provided is not in proper order ( minimum, maximum ), it will be reordered.

A marker has its start frame and end frame. Animation will play between the start frame and the end frame of the marker if one marker is specified. Or animation will play between the start frame of the first marker and the end frame of the second marker if two markers are specified.

Name "playRange", Type Property::ARRAY of Property::INTEGER or Property::ARRAY of Property::STRING or Property::STRING (one marker).
Default 0 and the total frame number.

briefdescription.para: The stop behavior the AnimatedImageVisual and AnimatedVectorImageVisual will use.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "stopBehavior", Type StopBehavior::Type (Property::INTEGER)
Default value is StopBehavior::CURRENT_FRAME.

briefdescription.para: Specifies a speed factor for the animated image frame.

detaileddescription.para: Name "frameSpeedFactor", type Property::FLOAT.
The speed factor is a multiplier of the normal velocity of the animation. Values between [0,1] will slow down the animation and values above one will speed up the animation.

simplesect.para: The range of this value is clamped between [0.01f ~ 100.0f]. It might be supported out of bound, and negative value in future.
It is used in the AnimatedImageVisual and AnimatedVectorImageVisual. The default is 1.0f.

briefdescription.para: Defines the batch size for pre-loading images in the AnimatedImageVisual.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "batchSize", type Property::INTEGER, number of images to pre-load before starting to play. Default value: 2
Optional.
Minimum supported value is 2.

briefdescription.para: Defines the cache size for loading images in the AnimatedImageVisual.

detaileddescription.para: Name "cacheSize", type Property::INTEGER, number of images to keep cached ahead during playback. Default value: 2

simplesect.para: , cacheSize should be >= batchSize. If it isn't, then the cache will automatically be changed to batchSize.
, because of the defaults, it is expected that the application developer tune the batch and cache sizes to their particular use case.

briefdescription.para: The number of milliseconds between each frame in the AnimatedImageVisual.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "frameDelay", type Property::INTEGER, The number of milliseconds between each frame.
Optional.
This is only used when multiple URLs are provided.

briefdescription.para: The looping mode the AnimatedVectorImageVisual will use.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "loopingMode", Type LoopingMode::Type (Property::INTEGER)
Default value is LoopingMode::RESTART.

briefdescription.para: Whether to redraw the image when the visual is scaled down.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "redrawInScalingDown", type Property::BOOLEAN.
It is used in the AnimatedVectorImageVisual. The default is true.

briefdescription.para: Whether to redraw the image when the visual is scaled up.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "redrawInScalingUp", type Property::BOOLEAN.
It is used in the AnimatedVectorImageVisual. The default is true.

briefdescription.para: Whether to AnimatedVectorImageVisual fixed cache or not.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "enableFrameCache", type Property::BOOLEAN. If this property is true, AnimatedVectorImageVisual enable frame cache for loading and keeps loaded frame until the visual is removed. It reduces CPU cost when the animated image will be looping. But it can spend a lot of memory if the resource has high resolution image or many frame count.
It is used in the AnimatedVectorImageVisual. The default is false

briefdescription.para: Whether notify AnimatedVectorImageVisual to render thread after every rasterization or not.

detaileddescription.para: Name "notifyAfterRasterization", type Property::BOOLEAN. If this property is true, AnimatedVectorImageVisual send notify to render thread after every rasterization. If false, AnimatedVectorImageVisual set Renderer's Behaviour as Continouly (mean, always update the render thread.)

This flag is useful if given resource has low fps, so we don't need to render every frame.
It is used in the AnimatedVectorImageVisual. The default is false.

briefdescription.para: Renders a texture at a given scale.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "renderScale", type Property::FLOAT. Using render scale with Actor::Property::SCALE(= mRedrawInScalingUp is true) may scale twice. i.e RENDER_SCALE = 1.5f and SCALE = 2.0f would eventually multiply the texture by 3.0f
It is used when scaling up AnimatedVectorImageVisual. The default is 1.0f.

briefdescription.para: The playing state the AnimatedImageVisual and AnimatedVectorImageVisual will use.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "playState", Type Ui::AnimatedImage::PlayState (Property::INTEGER)
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: The current frame number the AnimatedImageVisual and AnimatedVectorImageVisual will use.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "currentFrameNumber", Type Property::INTEGER, between [0, the maximum frame number] or between the play range if specified
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: The total frame number the AnimatedImageVisual and AnimatedVectorImageVisual will use.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "totalFrameNumber", Type Property::INTEGER.
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: The content information the AnimatedVectorImageVisual will use.

detaileddescription.para:
Type Property::MAP. The map contains the layer name as a key and Property::Array as a value. And the array contains 2 integer values which are the frame numbers, the start frame number and the end frame number of the layer.
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: The marker information the AnimatedVectorImageVisual will use.

detaileddescription.para:
Type Property::MAP. The map contains the marker name as a key and Property::Array as a value. And the array contains 2 integer values which are the frame numbers, the start frame number and the end frame number of the marker.
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: Enumeration for the instance of properties belonging to the ImageVisual.
ImageVisual is to render an image into the control's quad.
